raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX claim XXXX I stated the item was lost. My policy covers me for lost items up to {$1000.00}. This was reported within 90 days and my claim requests a technician 's evaluation of the item. The item is lost, and can not be evaluated by a technician. The representative I spoke to on XX/XX/2023 would not let me file the claim as " lost '' stating my policy did not cover lost items. He said only theft was covered. I am not certain the item was stolen. Therefore the claim is reported lost under section i. of the " Mysterious Disappearance '' section of my purchase protection card policy. 

I spoke to XXXX different representatives, and both initially stated I could not file for a lost claim. Associates are not properly trained and are giving misinformation resulting in denial of claims of card members.
